info.title: VeriSol: Formal specification and verification tool for Solidity smart contracts

options.name: /noPrf
options.description: don't perform inductive verification, default: false

options.name: /txBound
options.description: only explore counterexamples with at most k transactions/loop unrollings, default: 4

options.name: /noTxSeq
options.description: don't print the transaction sequence on console, default: false

options.name: /contractInfer
options.description: perform Houdini based module invariant inference, default off

options.name: /inlineDepth
options.description:
inline nested calls upto depth k when performing modular proof and inference, default 4
------ Controls translation --------

options.name: /ignoreMethod
options.description:
multiple such pairs can be specified, ignored set is the union
a wild card '*' can be used for method, would mean all the methods of the contract

options.name: /noInlineAttrs
options.description: do not generate any {:inline x} attributes, to speed Corral (cannot use with /tryProof)

options.name: /stubModel
options.description:
the model of an unknown procedure or fallback. <s> can be either
skip      // treated as noop
havoc     // completely scramble the entire global state
callback  // treated as a non-deterministic callback into any of the methods of any contract

options.name: /useModularArithmetic
options.description: uses modular arithmetic for unsigned integers (experimental), default unbounded integers
